MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Olin, Esq., of the Law Offices of Brian Larsen, Tel. 415.398.5000, appearing specially for moving party Brian Larsen.

No other appearance. After an in camera hearing, ATTY. BRIAN LARSEN'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MARY HOPKINS is granted. The court found good cause and there was no appearance by plaintiff. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581
